title: Are Aliens Walking Among Us?
summary: A brief discussion exploring the idea that extraterrestrial beings may be living among humans disguised as people. The conversation touches on how advanced civilizations might use cloning or avatars to interact with primitive societies without detection.

key_claims.claim: Aliens might be living among us disguised as humans
You don't have to go into space to find intelligent life - it can be found here on Earth
An advanced civilization encountering a primitive, paranoid society would likely clone themselves or create avatars to walk among them undetected
